title: A small multicolor UFO spotted in Porto Alegre-RS [1999]
excerpt: FEB 28th, 1999. Time: 1h50 am. Duration: not determined. In Vila Ipiranga, Porto Alegre, State of Rio Grande do Sul, two people spotted an unidentified flying object, small in size and shaped like a multicolor star. According to the witnesses, the object flew from South to North alternating movements to the sides, ascents and stops. […]
text_preview: FEB 28th, 1999. Time: 1h50 am. Duration: not determined. In Vila Ipiranga, Porto Alegre, State of Rio Grande do Sul, two people spotted an unidentified flying object, small in size and shaped like a multicolor star. According to the witnesses, the object flew from South to North alternating movements to the sides, ascents and stops. Observations in the COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] report further state that: “The object was being observed from the apartment’s balcony […] it was stopped at first, then moved to the left and went up. Its colors alternated in green, red and blue.
summary: Two witnesses in Vila Ipiranga, Porto Alegre-RS observed a small multicolor star-shaped UFO alternating green, red, and blue colors while maneuvering erratically.
